title: chelonopsis moschata var. jesoensis
intro: Chelonopsis moschata var. jesoensis, also known as Japanese Chelonopsis or Korean Chelonopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Korea and Japan, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral actions. Chelonopsis moschata var. jesoensis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and coughs, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
